subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath manifested and revealed that which lay hidden in knowledge and concealed from eyes and sight. Glorified be He Who hath given speech unto all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ظهر و اظهر ما کان مکنونا فی العلم و مستورا عن العیوم و الابصار سبحان الذی انطق الاشیاء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @past, present and future of Iran, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
